properties.body: på maritim kanal 16/14 med kallesignal "Andøya Space".  Utenfor bemanning kan man sende henvendelse til mso@andoyaspace.no, eller ring tlf. 94 07 59 44  For SMS-varsling, send til 27222:  "ANDOYASPACE SJO START" for påmelding. "ANDOYASPACE SJO STOPP" for avmelding. Name: Danger area_DR Description: Andøya Space in collaboration with ISAR Aerospace is planning to launch the launch vehicle "Spectrum" from Andøya Spaceport in Børvågen, from June 15th, 2026, to June 21st 2026. Andøya  The danger area is active 15.06.2026-21.06.2026 with launch window 20:00 - 21:00 UTC (22:00-23:00 lokal tid.)The danger area is indicated as yellow prior to activation. The danger area is indicated red when it is less than 4-6 hours until it activates and the launch window opens. The danger area is deactivated and goes back to yellow as soon as the activity is finished.  Should there be a need for transit or use of the area, this can be coordinated with Andøya Space.   The operations centre is staffed during the launch window 11:00-23:30 local time. Contact us on phone 73 60 70 64/ 94 07 59 44, or on maritime channel 16/14 with call sign "Andøya Space".  Outside the launch window, inquiries can be sent to mso@andoyaspace.no, call phone 94 07 59 44  For SMS-varsling, send til 27222: "ANDOYASPACE SJO START" for påmelding. "ANDOYASPACE SJO STOPP" for avmelding.
properties.name: Andoya Danger Area
